1.premise: Women with cats are already conditioned to accept what cats model: loveless, abusive cohabitation.
A cat woman could be reframed as easy to please because she already accepts being unloved by a housemate.

2.premise: Gaslighting a cat-woman is like how a cat behaves, because both abuse earns the same reward: getting fed.

3.premise: "Not for the best reasons" to avoid cat women implies dark psychology, but reveals a simple allergy.

lines.text: Happy New Year, everybody.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: Since it's a new year, I decided to make new rules for myself.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: My newest rule is I decided I'm going to stop dating women with cats.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Yeah.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: It's tough because I don't know if y'all knew this, but women with cats are the biggest
lines.label: setup

lines.text: and toes out here.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: And it's so easy to keep a cat woman happy
lines.label: setup

lines.text: because she's already used to somebody in her house
lines.label: setup

lines.text: that doesn't love her.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: Like, my ex used to have a cat, and it's weird,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: 'cause I'm trying to be a good guy,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: but clearly she loves abuse.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: 'Cause, like, every time she would feed her cat,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: her cat would just beat her ass.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I'm like, "Goddamn."
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: And I'm jealous. I'm like, "Damn, I want her to cook for me,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: so I figure if I want some food,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I got to keep it even with the cat."
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I didn't hit her, but, um,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: What I did do was gas light her and knock shit over
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: from time to time.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: And it's not for the best reasons.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: It's not 'cause I hate cats,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: it's not 'cause I hate cat women.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I'm just allergic.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: Yeah, and I don't think women respect
lines.label: setup

lines.text: how hard it is to have sex on Benadryl.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: That's my time, y'all, Quentin Jones.
lines.label: fluff
